title: Physics Grapple
description: A physics-based grappling hook tool for world traversal! Once the hook attaches to a surface, your movement is governed by realistic swing mechanics and momentum, instead of teleportation!
body:
## 📖 Description

The **Physics Grappling Hook** datapack introduces an entirely new, skill-based way to traverse your Minecraft world. Unlike simple teleportation or fixed-line pulls, this hook is driven by a custom physics engine written by [@MulverineX](https://modrinth.com/user/MulverineX). It fundamentally changes aerial movement, making it a fun new alternative to swing around your world.

## ⭐ Features

  - Adds a craftable **Grappling Hook** item which you can use to swing arond the map.
  - Features **realistic physics**, allowing you to swing, gain speed, and maintain momentum to chain multiple movements together.
  - Includes an integrated cooldown and durability system to balance the tool.
 
## 🎓 More Info

🛠️ Crafting the Grappling Hook

The Grappling Hook can be crafted using the following recipe:

![Crafting Recipe For The Grappling Hook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e7316aa7dd14079ab64f66f379cdc0cf2d7554.png)

⚙️ Commands

| Command | Function |
| :---: | :---: |
| `/function grappling_hook:give_grapple` | Gives the player a Grappling Hook item. |
| `/reload` | Reloads the datapack in case something seems to not be working. |
